title: Nichirin Dynasty
description: Addon mod for Samurai Dynasty adding Nichirin Blades from Kimetsu no Yaiba
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e72f5a64f0a3606a191dfa89cb4983e56463361a_0.webp)

## ⚔️ Nichirin Dynasty is an addon for the Samurai Dynasty mod that adds weapons from Demon Slayer (Kimetsu no Yaiba).

![Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/951b00bf4554b4d43b43b2e5ae2d314a307a2cf6.png)

### This mod adds Nichirin Metal, a new material forged from the combination of iron, netherite, and blaze powder.
### The result is Raw Nichirin Metal, which can be refined in a Blast Furnace to produce the Nichirin Metal Ingot. With this ingot, the player can craft the Nichirin Sword.

![Nichirin Metal Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75a1c09a7833251bd2c93fa616228a6449ccd87c.png)

### By combining the Nichirin Sword with gems and metals from Minecraft and Epic Samurai on the Smithing Table, it is possible to craft all the katanas in the mod. It is also possible to craft other weapons using Nichirin Metal like mace, axe and blades.

![Weapons Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9401471390736cd2925265c8c1eb41bf4aeb3516.png)

### Each Weapon has unique attributes and effects, granting bonuses to the wielder and negative effects to enemies

### 🚨 This mod requires:

### [Samurai Dynasty](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-samurais)


### ⚔️ This mod also features integration with the:


### [Epic Fight](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight)

### [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)
